title: Sentinel APEX Zero-Day Hunter Weekly Intelligence Summary - GTI: 6.7/10
content:
Global Threat Index: 6.7/10 (ELEVATED)
Zero-Day Alerts: 138 total, 10 CRITICAL

CRITICAL ZERO-DAY ALERTS:

  - NETSCALER [KEV Rapid Addition]: CONFIRMED
  - BIG-IP [KEV Rapid Addition]: CONFIRMED
HIGH-PROBABILITY EXPLOITATION FORECASTS:

  - CVE-2025-53521: 60% within ACTIVE - Exploitation in progress

title: SENTINEL APEX Zero-Day Advisory: CVE-2026-3055

Alert Type: Classic Zero-Day Chain
Exploitation Status: CONFIRMED

Chain Evidence: cve_pub, patch_gap, poc_release, kev_add
